trivia: The stretched classic Dash 8 carries 50 passengers into airports that barely qualify as airports. Its rugged Canadian short-field genes keep survivors busy from the Pacific islands to the Arctic.
Classic Dash 8s lack the Q-series noise suppression, so passengers remember them louder than passengers remember Q400s.
funFacts: Built for genuinely short and rough runways.
A staple of island and northern operators.
